text: The real reason hiring is broken is because it's run by humans.
It's a minefield of bias, unqualified recruiters, arbitrarily shortlist candidates,
and you get ghosted 90% of the time.
AI can do better. We've used AI to process over 300,000 candidates,
to conduct over 100,000 interviews, and to create thousands of jobs.
The Mercur AI interviewer speaks with every candidate,
provides personalized feedback on how you did and systematically reduces human bias.
Let me show you how it works.
First, upload your resume to work.mercourt.com.
We'll dynamically understand your core strengths and tailor a custom interview to you.
Second, join the interview.
Can you explain the search infrastructure you developed to enable companies to efficiently
find their ideal candidates on the Mercur platform?
Yeah, on the Mercur platform, any company can go in and describe their ideal candidate in natural
language and we'll retrieve and display candidates based on who's both relevant and excellent.
How did you evaluate the trade-offs between traditional lexical search methods, such as
BM25, dense retrieval using embeddings, and hybrid search approaches?
Yeah, traditional search techniques can be pretty constraining, but are also very reliable.
Once you complete the interview, you'll be added to our talent pool.
Companies can view your profile and send you high-quality job offers that allow you to work
from anywhere. Our mission is to bring meritocracy back to hiring and to help a billion people find
their next job.
